title: Research: @thedefiedge — DeFi yield real vs emissoes: relevancia pos BTC -20%

context.description:
## Objetivo
Pesquisa de oportunidade financeira/estrategica identificada em tweet. Explorar em profundidade e responder as 3 perguntas obrigatorias.

## Contexto
- **Tweet original:** https://x.com/thedefiedge/status/2031345754208714842?s=20
- **Autor:** @thedefiedge
- **Texto do tweet:** Most DeFi yield still comes from the same place: 
Token emissions or recycled crypto liquidity.

So when $BTC drops 20%, your yield usually drops with it too.

That’s why a lot of “yield diversification” doesn’
